title: DEP Proof Claim
description: A signed claim that a verified decision outcome was produced under known conditions. Proof claims are verifiable independently.

subject_id.description: Reference to the subject (decision, observation, bundle).

claim_type.description: Type of claim, e.g. proof_of_mitigation, verified_outcome.

signature.description: Cryptographic signature over the claim fields.

conditions.description: Conditions under which the claim is valid.
